name: bashkit-examples
description: Bashkit usage examples — installs from npm by default

scripts.examples: node bash_basics.mjs && node data_pipeline.mjs && node llm_tool.mjs && node k8s_orchestrator.mjs && node langchain_integration.mjs && node custom_builtins.mjs
scripts.examples:ai: node openai_tool.mjs && node vercel_ai_tool.mjs && node langchain_agent.mjs
